data.body: SCOPE DECISIONS (proceeding on recommended defaults; user dismissed the prompt): (1) ADD full library + MCP parity for summary/list-epics/bridge-fsck (rebar.summary/list_epics/bridge_fsck + MCP tools w/ typed outputSchema) — matches epic cross-interface AC + coverage guard. (2) check_ac/quality_check library+MCP SWITCH to the structured schema-backed shape ({verdict,criteria_count,reason} / {verdict,line_count,keyword_count,ac_items,file_impact,reason}); breaking pre-1.0 lib API change, single shape across CLI/lib/MCP. Both recorded for T1/T4 implementation.
